source.purpose: Ticket 08: protect Narrator prompt facade/module extraction for Hegemony system blocks, authored chapter situation, and normal message assembly without live model calls.

frame.title: The Sealed Gate
frame.premise: A registry checkpoint can still be turned before the audit closes.
frame.activePressure: The gate clerk will seal the record unless Ren forces a lawful delay.
frame.centralTension: Procedure protects the settlement and buries it at the same time.
frame.objective: Secure a lawful delay at the checkpoint.
frame.crucible: Ren must decide how much authority to spend on a suspect record.

outcomeSpectrum.clean: The delay is granted without exposing Ren.
outcomeSpectrum.costly: The delay holds, but Ren owes the clerk a formal explanation.
outcomeSpectrum.failure: The record seals and the settlement loses appeal standing.
outcomeSpectrum.catastrophic: The clerk flags Ren for interference and escalates to command.

antagonistField.corePressure: Forms become verdicts when no one challenges them.
antagonistField.escalationLogic: Each challenge moves the dispute from desk discretion to command review.

pressureLadder.pressure: The clerk starts the seal clock.
pressureLadder.triggerCondition: Ren asks for delay without citing authority.
pressureLadder.narrativeEffect: The checkpoint prints a closure receipt.

pressureLadder.triggerCondition: Ren contradicts the registry record directly.
pressureLadder.narrativeEffect: An auditor is notified before Ren can leave.

arcLink.chapterFunction: force the institution to show its seams
arcLink.playerStanceRead: Ren is still enforcing law, but selectively

pacingContract.chapterQuestion: Can Ren win time without openly defecting?
pacingContract.earlyPressure: The line backs up behind Ren.
pacingContract.middlePressure: The clerk asks for a cited authority.
pacingContract.latePressure: Command review becomes the cost of delay.

arcPlan.title: The Registry's Mercy
arcPlan.arcQuestion: Can an officer make law protect people it was built to sort?

scenarioShape.premise: A lawful apparatus produces human harm through ordinary compliance.

thread_gate_delay.title: The gate delay
thread_gate_delay.resolutionCriteria: Ren wins or loses a lawful delay.
thread_gate_delay.failureMode: The record seals and appeal standing collapses.
thread_gate_delay.retrievalCue: The registry checkpoint can still be delayed before the record seals.

input.playerInput: Ask the clerk what authority would stop the seal.
